question: Which regions have more than one building? Give me the names of the regions.
sql: SELECT r.Name FROM building b JOIN region r ON b.Region_ID = r.Region_ID GROUP BY r.Region_ID HAVING COUNT(b.Building_ID) > 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找具有多个建筑的地区名称

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，SQL反向翻译描述准确表达了原始问题的意图，即查找具有多个建筑的地区名称，且涉及的表、列、聚合和分组逻辑与原始问题匹配。
